title: you're not (why)
body:
lyrics

i don't know who needs to hear this but
you're not normal. why normalize
you're not white. why racialize
you're not a man. why patronize
you're not cut off. why digitize
you're not fixed. why essentialize
you're not central. why marginalize
you're not powerful. why victimize
you're not chosen. why tribalize
you're not the skin. why personalize
you're not clean. why stigmatize
you're not seen. why turn your eyes
you're not alone. why cut your ties
you're not boring. why publicize
you're not meant for more. why romanticize
you're not for meant for worship. why idolize
you're not meant for war. why weaponize
you're not sorry. why apologize
you're not informed. why eulogize
you're not in the story. why narrativize
you're not stuck. why not improvise
you're not fucked. why not improvise
not struck down yet these different times
not luckbound yet these digging times
you're not stuck. why not improvise
you're not fucked. why not improvise
not locked out yet these different lines
not above ground yet these digging rhymes

collaborators



videos

i got hot sauce in my pocket, rock it

like she grindin on it

this is how you spit gems

if you brought a light you should shine it on me

pumpin through ya systems

it's my blood, but you're the heart it lives in

if you like how i wri...maybe you should get in

baby i'm a baby you'se a baby who's a baby

lately i feel crazy you should save me on a playlist

i ain't beggin but i bet this

ain't the first time that you played this

second if a second is a second then i

cherish every one you spent on

this record from the second second on

this record of my time here

meets its reckon every time ya hear it

the first loop is my life here

the rest fills in the sacred space between my mouth and your ear

i'm here cuz your near

i'm outchea cuz you taught me how to rhyme prayers

from outkast to rhymesayer

i'm out past the boundary cuz that's where you found me

raised me, ground me, fired me up, and pound me

into a submission

listen to this'n

i'm submittin proudly

musician, reveal thyself

i'm dead naked

waiting to see whatcha make up out me
